vendor.description: Company or community project behind the integration.

integrates_with.description: Which parts of the stack this integrates with.

description.description: One technical sentence. No marketing superlatives; claims must be verifiable.

github.description: GitHub username accountable for this integration.

repository.description: Canonical home of the integration's source.

homepage.description: Optional product page. Marketing lives here, not in the README.

license.description: SPDX identifier of the integration directory's license.

tier.description: Set by maintainers during review, never self-declared. New submissions use community.

trace_conformance_level.description: Required if the integration emits or consumes TRACE records: the agentrust-trace-tests level it passes.

tested_against.description: Released package versions the integration was last tested against.
